subtitle: Copenhagen's main beach is a machine: a 2 km artificial island built in 2004-2005 to make a lagoon, reached by a metro line that opened in 2007 to serve it.
spike_statement: Built in 2004-2005, Amager Strandpark is a 2 km man-made island that turns the strait into a shallow lagoon, with a metro line opened in 2007 to bring the city to it.
